name: Pingidentity Stale Active Accounts (180 days)
description: Detects long-dormant active pingidentity accounts with no recent login activity for 180 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.last_sign_on AS last_login FROM pingidentity_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.enabled, true) = true AND (u.last_sign_on IS NULL OR u.last_sign_on < NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days')
remediation: Immediately disable long-dormant accounts and require formal reactivation approval for reinstatement.
